description:
Create a NEMA 23 stepper motor mounting flange in FreeCAD's Part Design workbench. The part should be a circular disc with a center pilot hole and four bolt holes arranged in a polar pattern.

Specifications (Standard NEMA 23):
- Flange Outer Diameter: 60 mm
- Flange Thickness: 5 mm
- Center Pilot Hole: 38.1 mm diameter (Through-all)
- Bolt Circle Diameter (BCD): 47.14 mm
- Bolt Hole Diameter: 5.5 mm (Through-all)
- Number of Bolt Holes: 4 (Equally spaced 90 degrees)

Save the final document to '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/nema23_motor_flange.FCStd'.
